Professional Summary

Cybersecurity professional with hands-on expertise in offensive security operations, vulnerability assessment, digital forensics, and enterprise risk management. Proven ability to identify, exploit, and remediate security gaps across network infrastructure, web applications, and cloud environments. Proficient in Linux-based security distributions, industry-standard tooling, and frameworks including MITRE ATT&CK, OWASP, and NIST CSF. Committed to delivering actionable security intelligence and compliance-aligned risk mitigation strategies.

Technical Skills

Security Domains: Network Security, Ethical Hacking, Web App Security, Digital Forensics, Risk Management
Security OS: Kali Linux, Parrot OS, BlackArch, DEFT Linux, Tails OS
Recon & Scanning: Nmap, Masscan, Shodan, theHarvester, Recon-ng
Exploitation: Metasploit, SQLmap, Burp Suite, Hydra, Aircrack-ng, USB Rubber Ducky
Forensics & Analysis: Wireshark, John the Ripper, Autopsy, Volatility, FTK Imager, Ghiro
Frameworks: OWASP Top 10/ASVS, MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, ISO/IEC 27001, CIS Controls
Scripting: Bash, Python (scapy, requests), PowerShell, Regex
Platforms: Linux/Unix, Windows Server, Docker, AWS Security Fundamentals
